quests.hint: DEFINITION: The ability of a customer to obtain goods or services.
quests.explanation: Academic context: The author was given CREDIT for the discovery of the lost manuscript.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: An abstract idea; a general notion.

quests.passage: The fundamental [TARGET] of quantum entanglement remains difficult to grasp.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Just behavior or treatment.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The systematic investigation into and study of materials.

quests.passage: Extensive [TARGET] is required before publishing a new scientific paper.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A plan or drawing produced to show the look and function.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Examine something methodically and in detail.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A place, person, or thing from which something comes or can be obtained.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Explain the meaning of information, words, or actions.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A group or system of interconnected people or things.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A proposed explanation made on the basis of limited evidence.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Eat, drink, or ingest.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A circumstance, fact, or influence that contributes to a result.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Relating to the whole world; worldwide.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: The arts and other manifestations of human intellectual achievement.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: A particular part or feature of something.

quests.hint: DEFINITION: Consisting of many different and connected parts.
